rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/conceptual synthesis that explicitly “summarize[s] 12 special-issue papers in a comparative table,” and the cited 2022 paper (same journal DOI family 10.1177/00222437...) is a topical education-study that plausibly belongs to that special issue set. Given this context, the citation is likely part of substantive synthesis of issue contributions rather than a purely incidental background mention.
